name: Vehicle Decommission Process
description: Complete process for decommissioning a fleet vehicle

substeps.title: Document all damage and wear
substeps.description: Photograph and record all damage, wear, or missing items

substeps.title: Record final odometer reading
substeps.description: Document exact mileage at time of decommission

substeps.title: Inventory all vehicle equipment
substeps.description: Account for all tools, accessories, and add-on equipment

steps.title: Remove Vehicle Data and Equipment
steps.description: Secure removal of company data and equipment

substeps.title: Remove GPS tracking devices
substeps.description: Uninstall and collect all GPS tracking equipment

substeps.title: Wipe electronic systems data
substeps.description: Clear any stored company data from vehicle systems

substeps.title: Remove company branding and decals
substeps.description: Strip all company logos, decals, and identifying marks

substeps.title: Calculate remaining book value
substeps.description: Determine current depreciated value of vehicle

substeps.title: Determine disposal method
substeps.description: Decide if vehicle will be sold, auctioned, or scrapped

substeps.title: Prepare title transfer documentation
substeps.description: Gather and prepare all necessary title and ownership documents

steps.title: Update All Systems
steps.description: Update vehicle status across all management systems

substeps.title: Update fleet management system
substeps.description: Change vehicle status to 'decommissioned' in fleet system

substeps.title: Notify insurance company
substeps.description: Inform insurance carrier of vehicle decommission

substeps.title: Generate decommission report
substeps.description: Create comprehensive report of decommission process

substeps.title: Archive vehicle records
substeps.description: Move all vehicle records to archived status

substeps.title: Notify all stakeholders
substeps.description: Send notifications to fleet management, finance, and other departments
